general_policies.no_show_policy: Three no-shows in 12 months may result in discharge to self-scheduling portal only.
general_policies.interpreter_services: Available in 200+ languages — request at least 24 hours in advance by calling 555-400-0010

appointment_types.insurance_note: Covered 100% under most plans as preventive care. Confirm with your insurer.
appointment_types.scheduling_note: Must not be combined with sick visit per Medicare rules.
Same-day availability — call before 10 AM for best access.

appointment_types.insurance_note: Covered by most major insurers post-2023 parity laws. Patient must be in the state of service at time of visit.
appointment_types.scheduling_note: Link sent via MyGrace patient portal 30 minutes before visit. Must have camera-enabled device.
Should be scheduled within 7–14 days of an ER visit or hospital discharge.

appointment_types.insurance_note: Standard evaluation & management billing. Bring insurance card, photo ID, and medication list.
appointment_types.scheduling_note: Bring completed new patient forms from MyGrace portal. Arrive 15 minutes early.

appointment_types.insurance_note: Many plans require a PCP referral and prior authorization. Always verify before scheduling.
appointment_types.scheduling_note: Referral must be active in system before appointment is confirmed.

appointment_types.insurance_note: Lab order required from provider. Walk-in accepted Mon–Fri 7 AM – 4 PM.
appointment_types.scheduling_note: Fasting required for glucose and lipid panels — no food or caloric beverages 8–12 hours prior.

appointment_types.insurance_note: Order required. Covered under most plans.
appointment_types.scheduling_note: Walk-in accepted at Radiology Center. Results in MyGrace portal within 24 hours.

appointment_types.insurance_note: Prior authorization almost always required. Grace Health team will obtain auth before scheduling.
appointment_types.scheduling_note: Notify scheduler of metal implants or claustrophobia for MRI. Contrast requires creatinine lab within 30 days.

appointment_types.insurance_note: Mental health parity laws apply. Co-pay same as medical visit under most plans.
appointment_types.scheduling_note: Intake coordinator will call within 48 hours of referral submission. Crisis patients: call 988 or go to ED.

locations.name: Grace Health Main Campus
locations.hours: Mon–Fri 7 AM – 7 PM, Sat 8 AM – 2 PM
